backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ASTROMANIA backend, combining blob storage and authorization mixins to manage gemstones, reviews, cart, booking requests, contact submissions, gallery items, social media links, and user profiles with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (bio section, service list changes, gallery, etc.) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every page and component.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, muted, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'ASTROMANIA by Vijay Sawkar' that mounts the React app via a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for all pages (Home, About, Services, Gallery, GemstoneShop, Testimonials, Contact, BookConsultation), wraps the app in ThemeProvider and React Query, and renders a shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/FAQ.tsx: Accordion-based FAQ section component displaying five common questions about Kundali reading, Vastu correction, gemstone selection, gemstone effectiveness, and online consultations with styled dark-theme UI.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, social media links, quick navigation links, services list, and contact details for Astro-Vastu Knowledge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation links, and an Internet Identity login/logout button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisted identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend data operations including gemstones, reviews, cart, bookings, contact submissions, gallery, and user profiles.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS including a deep cosmic dark theme with custom OKLCH design tokens, Tailwind directives, typography, form styling, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Displays a detailed About page for astrologer Vijay Sawkar, including credentials, stats, a career timeline, and areas of expertise with navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/BookConsultation.tsx: Renders a consultation booking form that collects user details, consultation type/mode, and submits the request via a mutation hook, showing a success confirmation on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Provides a contact page with a message submission form, a media gallery with admin-only upload/delete capabilities using chunked blob uploads, and social/contact info display.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Displays a filterable image/video gallery fetched from the backend, with admin-only upload and delete functionality using chunked blob uploads and a lightbox modal for selected media.
frontend/src/pages/GemstoneShop.tsx: Renders a gemstone shop page listing Vedic astrology gemstones with details, benefits, and weight options, supporting a cart and WhatsApp-based order flow.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page for Vijay Sawkar's astrology website featuring a hero section, services grid, stats bar, and testimonials with links to booking and services pages.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services listing page detailing six offerings (Vedic Astrology, Vastu Shastra, Gemstone Therapy, Muhurta, Kundali Matching, New Kundali) with descriptions, inclusions, modes, and durations.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Testimonials page displaying eight client reviews with star ratings, service tags, and locations in a styled cosmic-themed layout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, with helpers to persist values in sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a cosmic dark-theme palette (gold, cyan, navy), custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant Garamond), box shadows, background images, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project state and feature requests for Vijay Sawkar's astrology website, including pending tasks like adding a bio section, removing Numerology, adding New Kundali service, and a photo/video gallery.
